puzzleDescription: Learn how to use the 'default' keyword to handle unexpected inputs in a switch statement.
objective: Input a number: 1 for Burger, 2 for Pizza. For any other number, print 'Invalid Choice'.
hints: The 'default:' case doesn't need a specific value; it catches everything else.
Use 'default:' at the end of your switch block.
Print exactly 'Invalid Choice' for the default scenario.
